texto: I am training at such a high level that I actually could eat anything and get by. But as my coach always says, your body is like a car, and food is like your fuel. I am a race car, so I can't just put unleaded fuel in my car. I need that good premium fuel.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lolo Jones: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “I am training at such a high level that I actually could eat anything and get by. But as my coach…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, food, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e good.

frase_original: I am training at such a high level that I actually could eat anything and get by. But as my coach always says, your body is like a car, and food is like your fuel. I am a race car, so I can't just put unleaded fuel in my car. I need that good premium fuel.
